nasb.text: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and he was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father; and Ahaz his son became king in his place.

esv.text: Jotham slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father, and Ahaz his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 約坦和他的祖先一同長眠，也和他的祖先葬在一起，在他祖宗大衛的城裡。他的兒子亞哈斯接續他作王。

ccb.text: 约坦与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。他儿子亚哈斯继位。
